SEARCH

Uses of Class
common.dto.ClientRequest

Packages that use ClientRequest
Package
Description
client.net
Client networking: the persistent TCP connection to the server and the event bus that delivers server-pushed real-time updates.
client.service
Client service layer: a typed facade over the raw connection.
server.control
Server business logic: the controllers and services that implement GoNature's use cases.
server.net
Server networking: the OCSF-style TCP server that accepts client connections, tracks each ClientSession, routes incoming ClientRequests to the domain layer via RequestRouter, and reports lifecycle events through the ServerListener callback interface.

  • Uses of ClientRequest in client.net

    Methods in client.net with parameters of type ClientRequest
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ServerResponse
    ClientConnection.sendRequest(ClientRequest req)
    Sends a request and blocks the caller's thread until the matching response arrives, the request times out, or the connection drops.

  • Uses of ClientRequest in client.service

    Methods in client.service with parameters of type ClientRequest
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    CompletableFuture<ServerResponse>
    NetworkService.send(ClientRequest req)
    Send a request using the active Session connection, asynchronously.

  • Uses of ClientRequest in server.control

    Methods in server.control with parameters of type ClientRequest
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ServerResponse
    AuthController.handle(ClientRequest request, ClientSession session)
    Handles authentication and registration requests.
    ServerResponse
    DomainController.handle(ClientRequest request, ClientSession session)
    Handles one request and produces the response to send back.
    ServerResponse
    NotificationController.handle(ClientRequest request, ClientSession session)
    Processes notification requests for the currently logged-in actor.
    ServerResponse
    ParkController.handle(ClientRequest request, ClientSession session)
    Processes park management and parameter-change requests.
    ServerResponse
    ReportController.handle(ClientRequest request, ClientSession session)
    Processes report requests for a department manager.
    ServerResponse
    ReservationController.handle(ClientRequest request, ClientSession session)
    Processes reservation and waiting-list requests.
    ServerResponse
    VisitController.handle(ClientRequest request, ClientSession session)
    Processes visit and occupancy requests.
    private Integer
    ReportController.parkIdParam(ClientRequest request)
    Reads the optional parkId filter from the request, normalising "no park" to null: a missing value, the sentinel string "ALL" (any case), or a blank string all mean the whole region.
    private WaitlistEntryDTO
    ReservationController.resolveEntry(ClientRequest request)
    Resolves the waiting-list entry a request targets.

  • Uses of ClientRequest in server.net

    Methods in server.net with parameters of type ClientRequest
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ServerResponse
    RequestRouter.handle(ClientRequest request, ClientSession session)
    Dispatches one request: handles the infrastructure ops (PING / SUBSCRIBE / UNSUBSCRIBE) inline and routes every domain op to its registered controller.
